steps.title: Convert gallon to fluid ounces
steps.content:
Step 1: Convert the pitcher volume to fluid ounces.
$$1\text{ gallon}=128\text{ fl oz}$$
The glass holds approximately $$16\text{ fl oz}$$.

steps.title: Compute number of fills
steps.content:
Step 2: Divide the total fluid ounces by the glass volume.
$$\frac{128}{16}=8$$
Thus Jenny can fill the glass 8 times.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
